# Basic performance test
# Tests that tools respond within reasonable time

# Set test environment
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=5s

# Test mcpspy performance with simple input
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"test\"}" | mcpspy --pretty'
stdout '"jsonrpc": "2.0"'
stdout '"method": "test"'

# Test mcp-probe basic performance (sample output)
exec mcp-probe
stdout '"method":"initialize"'
